Title: Create Account Functionality
Preconditions: User has a valid email address and password, internet connection
Test Data: Email: testuser@example.com, Password: SecurePass123!, Confirm Password: SecurePass123!
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and navigate to the registration screen.
2. Enter the email address "testuser@example.com".
3. Enter the password "SecurePass123!".
4. Re-enter the password "SecurePass123!".
5. Click the "Create Account" button.
Expected Result: Account creation confirmation message appears, and a verification email is sent to the provided email address.

Title: Email Confirmation for Account Creation
Preconditions: User has created an account but not confirmed email
Test Data: Email: testuser@example.com, Verification link: <link from email>
Test Steps:
1. Check the email inbox for "testuser@example.com".
2. Locate the verification email from ECO-DIGIFY.
3. Click the verification link in the email.
Expected Result: User account is confirmed, and the app displays a success message upon next login.

Title: Add Object to System
Preconditions: User is logged in, has a verified account
Test Data: Object name: "Old Laptop", Description: "Functional, 8GB RAM", Category: Electronics, Condition: Good
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Add Object" screen.
2. Enter "Old Laptop" in the object name field.
3. Enter "Functional, 8GB RAM" in the description field.
4. Select "Electronics" as the category.
5. Select "Good" as the condition.
6. Click the "Add Object" button.
Expected Result: Object is successfully added to the user's profile and appears in their list of available objects.

Title: View Another User’s Object
Preconditions: User is logged in, another user has added an object
Test Data: Object: "Vintage Book", Owner: User2
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Browse Objects" screen.
2. Locate the object "Vintage Book" owned by User2.
3. Click on the object card.
Expected Result: Object details (name, description, category, condition, owner info) are displayed.

Title: Express Interest in an Object
Preconditions: User is logged in, another user has added an object
Test Data: Object: "Vintage Book", Owner: User2
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Browse Objects" screen.
2. Locate the object "Vintage Book".
3. Swipe the object card to the right (express interest).
Expected Result: System notifies the owner (User2) of the interest, and the object card disappears from the user's browse feed.

Title: Match Between Two Users
Preconditions: User1 has expressed interest in User2’s object, User2 has expressed interest in User1’s object
Test Data: User1’s object: "Old Laptop", User2’s object: "Vintage Book"
Test Steps:
1. User1 swipes User2’s object ("Vintage Book") to the right.
2. User2 swipes User1’s object ("Old Laptop") to the right.
Expected Result: A match notification appears for both users, and a chat option is enabled for coordination.

Title: Initiate Chat After Match
Preconditions: A match exists between User1 and User2
Test Data: Match: User1 (Old Laptop) and User2 (Vintage Book)
Test Steps:
1. Open the match notification for User1 and User2.
2. Click the "Chat" button.
Expected Result: Chat interface opens, allowing both users to message each other.

Title: Swap Objects After Agreement
Preconditions: Users have agreed via chat to swap objects, match is active
Test Data: User1’s object: "Old Laptop", User2’s object: "Vintage Book"
Test Steps:
1. Both users confirm the swap in the chat.
2. User1 clicks the "Confirm Swap" button in the match details.
Expected Result: Objects are marked as swapped in the system, and both users receive a confirmation notification. Objects are removed from available listings.

Title: Create New Account
Preconditions: Application is installed on the device
Test Data: Valid email, password, name, and other required fields
Test Steps:
1. Open the application for the first time
2. Fill in the registration form with valid data
3. Submit the form
Expected Result: User receives an email with a confirmation link and account creation is pending until email confirmation

Title: Add New Object to Profile
Preconditions: User is logged into the application
Test Data: Valid object details (name, description, images)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Add Object" section
2. Fill in the required fields (name, description, images)
3. Submit the form
Expected Result: New object is added to the user’s profile and is available for barter

Title: Incomplete Object Form Submission
Preconditions: User is logged into the application
Test Data: Missing required fields (e.g., no name or description)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Add Object" section
2. Fill in only some of the required fields
3. Attempt to submit the form
Expected Result: Form submission is rejected, and an error message is displayed

Title: Successful Login with Valid Credentials
Preconditions: User account exists in the system with valid credentials
Test Data: Registered username and correct password
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the login screen.
3. Enter the registered username.
4. Enter the correct password.
5. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the home screen.

Title: Application Installation on Supported Devices
Preconditions: None
Test Data: Android device with version >=7.1 or iOS device with version >=12
Test Steps:
1. Download the application from the official store.
2. Install the application on the device.
3. Open the application.
Expected Result: Application installs successfully and runs without errors on the specified devices.

Title: Successful User Profile Creation
Preconditions: App installed, email not registered, registration screen displayed
Test Data: Valid name, surname, birthdate, phone, unique email, password, location
Test Steps:
1. User opens registration screen.
2. User fills all required fields with valid data.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: New user record created in the database, user can log in and use the app.

Title: Registration with Duplicate Email
Preconditions: App installed, registration screen displayed
Test Data: Existing registered email, other valid fields
Test Steps:
1. User opens registration screen.
2. User fills all fields, including an already registered email.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: Error message displayed, no new user record created.

Title: Successful Object Insertion
Preconditions: User logged in, object insertion screen displayed
Test Data: Valid object name, description, photo
Test Steps:
1. User opens object insertion screen.
2. User fills all required fields with valid data.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: New object record created in the database, object available for barter.

Title: Match Notification and Chat Creation
Preconditions: Two users logged in, both have objects available, mutual interest expressed
Test Data: User A swipes right on User B’s object, User B swipes right on User A’s object
Test Steps:
1. User A swipes right on User B’s object.
2. User B swipes right on User A’s object.
3. System detects mutual interest.
Expected Result: Notification sent to both users, chat created and stored in the database, users can start messaging.

Title: Chat Access After Match
Preconditions: Match occurred between User A and User B
Test Data: None
Test Steps:
1. User A opens the app and checks notifications.
2. User A clicks on the match notification.
Expected Result: Chat screen opens between User A and User B, users can exchange messages.

Title: Successful User Login
Preconditions: User registered, login screen displayed
Test Data: Valid email and password
Test Steps:
1. User opens login screen.
2. User enters valid email and password.
3. User submits credentials.
Expected Result: User logged in, token generated for API requests, user profile displayed.

Title: App Functionality Without Internet
Preconditions: App installed, no internet connection
Test Data: None
Test Steps:
1. User opens the app without internet.
2. User attempts to log in or perform any action requiring API calls.
Expected Result: Error message displayed, no functionality requiring internet works.

Title: User Access to Own Data Only
Preconditions: User logged in, multiple users in the system
Test Data: User credentials, other users’ data
Test Steps:
1. User A logs in.
2. User A attempts to access User B’s data.
Expected Result: User A can only access their own data, no access to other users’ data.

Title: Response Time for User Actions
Preconditions: User logged in, stable internet connection
Test Data: None
Test Steps:
1. User performs an action (e.g., swipe, login).
2. System records response time.
Expected Result: Action completed in less than 2 seconds.

Title: App Compatibility on Supported OS
Preconditions: App installed on Android 7.1+ or iOS 12+
Test Data: None
Test Steps:
1. User installs the app on Android 7.1 or iOS 12.
2. User attempts to use the app.
Expected Result: App functions correctly, no crashes or compatibility issues.

Title: User Logout Functionality
Preconditions: The user is logged in.
Test Data: None
Test Steps: 1. User taps the logout button.
Expected Result: The previously assigned token is removed, and the user is redirected to the login screen. No side effects occur.
